title: Carlsen vs Nepomniachtchi (WCC G6)
intro: In this game, watch for the control of key squares around the kings and how hanging pieces can shift throughout the play. The players will create and remove threats, leading to tactical opportunities that can change the course of the game.
summary: The pressure around both kings shifted significantly throughout these moves. White maintained aggressive checks while Black responded with counterattacks, creating forks and hanging pieces. The evolving positions led to increased threats and tactical opportunities for both sides.
